channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Investigation into Nigel Farage's Surrey Home Purchase and £5m Gift
item.description: Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, is under scrutiny over claims regarding the purchase of his £1.4 million home in Surrey. The party stated that Farage used a fee earned from appearing on the ITV rea...

item.title: Florida Congressman Criticizes Kentucky Republican Massie Amid GOP Primary Tensions
item.description: Florida Congressman Randy Fine appeared on Real America's Voice to publicly criticize fellow Republican Thomas Massie of Kentucky, highlighting a growing rift within the GOP ahead of the primary elect...

item.title: Oyo State Government Vows To Rescue Abducted Students and Teachers
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don declare say him government no go gree make terror take control after some students and teachers bin kidnapped for Oriire Local Government Area. Governor tok say t...

item.title: Airtel launches 4G tower to improve connectivity and boost local economy in Hai, Kilimanjaro
item.description: Residents of Mungushi Village in Hai District, Kilimanjaro Region, are now enjoying better communication services after Airtel Tanzania officially launched a new 4G tower in the area. For years, local...

item.title: Toronto man faces multiple sexual assault charges following past public nuisance incidents
item.description: Samuel Opoku, a Toronto resident previously known for throwing buckets of liquified feces on strangers in 2019, has been arrested on new charges. The 30-year-old is now facing two counts of sexual ass...

item.title: FCT Minister Orders Investigation, Engineer Arrested After Abuja Building Collapse
item.description: Minister of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Nyesom Wike, don order full investigation after one building collapse for Gudu, Abuja wey don kill five people. Wike say government don seal the premis...

item.title: Free State councillors seek municipal jobs amid election uncertainty
item.description: In the Free State, several councillors have applied for employment within the same municipalities they currently serve, reportedly due to uncertainty about their re-election prospects in the 2026 loca...

item.title: Intimate 1969 Portraits of Johnny Cash by Michael Rougier
item.description: In 1969, renowned photographer Michael Rougier captured a series of intimate and revealing photographs of Johnny Cash for LIFE magazine. Unlike the gritty, performance-focused images from Cash's famou...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi criticises PM Modi for avoiding journalist’s questions during Norway visit
item.description: During Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s official visit to Norway, a video surfaced showing him walking away as a Norwegian journalist attempted to ask questions. The journalist, Helle Lyng, highlighted ...

item.title: Mother donates kidney to save daughter after years of illness and financial struggle
item.description: In Mwanza Region, Tanzania, 63-year-old farmer Rosemary Mtiro went through a very difficult journey to save her 26-year-old daughter Olivia Fabian Rweganwa. Olivia’s kidney failure started showing sym...

item.title: Eskom warns Joburg of potential power cuts over R5.2bn debt
item.description: Eskom has renewed its warning that Johannesburg could face widespread power disconnections due to an outstanding debt of R5.2 billion. The city has until 8 July to settle its arrears or risk Eskom cut...

item.title: Bo Bichette Discusses Performance Struggles and Future with the Mets
item.description: Bo Bichette, who signed a three-year, $126 million deal with the New York Mets, has faced a challenging start to the 2026 season. The Mets, currently 20-26 and struggling in the NL East, have raised q...

item.title: Complainant expresses frustration after Sibanyoni extortion case is struck off court roll
item.description: The complainant in the extortion case against Mpumalanga taxi boss Joe 'Ferrari' Sibanyoni has expressed deep disappointment after the court struck the matter off the roll. The businessman, whose iden...

item.title: Accord Condemns Attack on Adeleke Campaign Office in Osogbo
item.description: Accord Party don strongly condemn the recent attack wey happen for Imole House, wey be Governor Ademola Adeleke campaign office and party secretariat for Osogbo, Osun State. According to the party, na...

item.title: Wayfair Features Celebrities in Latest 'Wayborhood' Ad Campaigns
item.description: Wayfair has pulled together a colourful mix of celebrities and influencers for their latest adverts under the 'Wayborhood' theme, which celebrates personal style and home individuality. Leading the pa...

item.title: Nasir Daura Wins APC Primary for Daura Senatorial Zone
item.description: The Speaker of the Katsina State House of Assembly, Hon. Nasir Daura, don carry the victory for the All Progressives Congress (APC) senatorial primary election for Daura senatorial zone. The primary e...

item.title: London Tube Strikes Suspended After Last-Minute Agreement Between Union and TfL
item.description: London Underground strikes that were scheduled for this week have been suspended following a last-minute shift in position by Transport for London (TfL). The Rail, Maritime and Transport (RMT) union h...

item.title: Security Guard Killed in Shooting at San Diego Mosque; Two Suspects Die by Apparent Suicide
item.description: A security guard was killed in a shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, the largest mosque in San Diego County, on Monday, May 18, 2026. According to law enforcement officials, two men believed ...

item.title: Belo Medical Group's Scar Project: Empowering Participants Through Stories of Healing
item.description: The Scar Project by Belo Medical Group is a unique initiative that highlights the journeys of seven participants who have experienced physical scars and the personal stories behind them. Led by Dr. Ha...

item.title: Drake targets Kendrick Lamar, Jay-Z, J. Cole and others on new album Iceman
item.description: Drake released three new albums last week, with ‘Iceman’ standing out for its pointed diss tracks aimed at several high-profile figures in music and sports. The 18-track album, which also features gue...
